meaning: n.[动] 无鳔石首鱼 <美> 掌握绝对权力的人,首领
examples: The company has already raised captive-bred yellowtail kingfish and mulloway.
The Kingfish mistakes a valuable ring for fake, sells it to Andy, finds out the truth, and tries to get it back.
Joined a fishing tour to Waterhouse Tasmania at Easter 2010. We caught plenty of flatheads, gurnards, pikes, kingfish, squids and Katy caught a gummy shark!
The Kingfish, Huey Long, a New-Deal-era governor, was a master of the style, followed closely by his younger brother, Earl.
Fish Face may look like a fish and chip shop, but the menu includes fish curries, sushi, and the intriguing Hiramasa kingfish with beetroot relish and pancetta.
